title: Migrate HumanUniqueness from Groth16 to PLONK for unified proving

artifacts.description: Existing HumanUniqueness circuit (BabyPbk + depth-20 Merkle + Poseidon nullifier). No logic changes required; only proving system swap. Annotate with PLONK-compatible custom gate hints if snarkjs PLONK is used.

Updated build script: replace groth16 setup phase with plonk setup using the shared universal SRS (ptau file already used by AgentPolicy and Delegation circuits). Produces plonk.zkey and verification_key.json.

Regenerated Solidity verifier via snarkjs exportSolidityVerifier --plonk. Replaces the Groth16 verifier. ABI surface: single verifyProof(bytes calldata proof, uint256[] calldata pubSignals) matching the unified verifier interface used by AgentPolicyVerifier and DelegationVerifier.
Update verifier interface import and call site to use the new PLONK verifier ABI. Remove any Groth16-specific vkAlpha/vkBeta/vkGamma/vkDelta storage if previously embedded on-chain.

Replace groth16.fullProve with plonk.fullProve (snarkjs). Remove groth16 WASM/zkey imports; point to shared plonk.zkey and human_uniqueness.wasm. Export proof in the unified ProofBundle type already used by agentPolicy and delegation provers.
Remove the ProvingSystem enum branch for GROTH16 in HumanUniqueness. Assert single PLONK path. Simplify bundle exports: drop groth16_wasm and groth16_zkey from the human module entry point.

Updated circuit spec: document SRS requirements (min 2^15 powers of tau), public signal layout, nullifier derivation, and proof serialization format. Note removal of trusted setup ceremony dependency.

Full prove/verify round-trip tests with PLONK. Cover: valid membership proof, invalid Merkle path rejection, nullifier collision detection, and proof serialization compatibility with HumanUniquenessVerifier.sol.
Hardhat/Foundry integration tests: deploy new PLONK verifier, submit valid and malformed proofs, assert gas costs are within acceptable delta vs Groth16 baseline (~10-15% increase expected on-chain).
Regression test asserting WASM bundle does not include groth16 runtime. Measure total SDK bundle size before/after; assert ≥1.8MB reduction.
Consumer migration guide: updated key file paths, new proof shape, removed ceremony requirement. Include before/after SDK snippet and bundle size comparison table.

steps: Verify shared universal SRS (ptau) has sufficient size for HumanUniqueness: compute constraint count for BabyPbk + Poseidon-3 + depth-20 Merkle (expected ~12k-15k constraints); confirm ptau supports ≥2^14 (16k) constraints.
Run circom compilation of human_uniqueness.circom unchanged; confirm R1CS output is identical to current Groth16 build (same constraint count validates no circuit regression).
Execute `snarkjs plonk setup` with the shared ptau to produce human_uniqueness.plonk.zkey; commit zkey hash to circuit/human_uniqueness/checksums.txt alongside AgentPolicy and Delegation zkey hashes.
Export PLONK verification key JSON via `snarkjs zkey export verificationkey`; regenerate HumanUniquenessVerifier.sol via `snarkjs zkey export solidityverifier --plonk`.
Update HumanRegistry.sol: swap verifier import, update verifyProof call signature to PLONK ABI, remove any on-chain Groth16 verification key storage slots, write Foundry migration script.
Update SDK humanUniqueness.ts prover to call plonk.fullProve; align ProofBundle serialization (bytes proof + uint256[] pubSignals) with unified interface; remove groth16 imports.
Update SDK build config (rollup/webpack): remove human_uniqueness_groth16.wasm and .zkey from bundle; ensure single proving-system code path in tree-shaking.
Write and run circuit-level round-trip tests (prove + verify off-chain) for valid and invalid inputs.
Write and run Hardhat/Foundry contract integration tests with new PLONK verifier; record gas costs.
Run bundle-size regression test; assert ≥1.8MB reduction in browser WASM payload.
Run full existing test suite (AgentPolicy, Delegation, HumanUniqueness) to confirm no cross-circuit regressions.
Update specs/human-uniqueness-plonk.md and consumer migration guide.
Open PR: include before/after bundle size diff, gas cost table, and confirmation that Semaphore v4 ceremony dependency is removed from build pipeline.
dependencies: Shared powers-of-tau file (ptau) with ≥2^14 constraints, already used by AgentPolicy and Delegation circuits
Hardhat or Foundry for Solidity verifier integration tests
Existing unified ProofBundle type in SDK (AgentPolicy/Delegation prover interface)
